calendar.matters:
Hearing On Request For Change Of Name Filed By Petitioner Leah Kennedy. Inadvertantly Set On March 18, 2008.
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter is added to calendar this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner, Leah Kennedy, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication filed today, March 20, 2008.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Leah Elizabeth Kennedy Mullin.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Off Calendar
